## About Dezy Dental Clinic

Dezy's modern dental clinics acrosshyderabad make quality oral care easy to access. With advanced tech and skilled dentists, they offer everything from implants and root canals to braces, Invisalign, and smile makeovers. Known for painless care, clear pricing, and consistent service, Dezy is considered one ofhyderabad's top dental clinic networks.

### FAQ's

Within how much time should I expect the Dezy team to get in touch with me after I post a query?

You will get an instant confirmation via WhatsApp and a call within 24 hours of raising a query. Alternatively, you can call 7618792440.

Are all your dentists experts?

Yes, all treatments are delivered by Dentists who are Masters of Dental Surgery in their respective fields and have 7+ years of experience.

What dental services are you known for?

We are popular for our wide range of services such as aligners, implants, veneers, root canals, extractions, and fillings amongst others.

Can I choose the dentist I want the treatment from?

Sure, you may. Though you will be assigned the best dentist for your requirement based on their specialization. You can go ahead with your assigned dentist or choose another one if you like.

Will I get the same doctor each time I visit?

Normally a dentist is assigned to your case from beginning to the end, but if you require any specialized treatment, you may be required to see a different specialist.

How are you able to provide a cost lower than other dental clinics?

This is because we do not charge high referral commissions to get you the right specialist. Apart from that, we source all our equipment directly from authentic importers and manufacturers helping us control costs without compromising on quality.

Is the first consultation always free?

Yes, at Dezy your first interaction with us is free.

Do you have same-day appointments? If not how long does one have to wait to get an appointment?

Yes, we do have the option of same-day appointments though this may not be temporarily available due to the pandemic. In that case, you will be intimated of your appointment - it should not take more than 24 hours for a clinic appointment.

What type of technology do you use?

As a technologically advanced company, Dezy uses the best-in-class dental AI tech and 3D printing for a seamless experience.

Will I get the same service across clinics?

Yes, we offer a standardized experience and a feel-good factor across all clinics. We adhere to the highest quality protocols, 100% sterilization, and the best technology in each Dezy clinic.

If I make one appointment at a particular location, can my follow-up appointment be at a different Dezy location?

Yes, this should not be an issue at all.

Where can I express my grievance if I am not satisfied?

You can reach out to the clinic directly, call us on +91 7618792440, or WhatsApp us on +91-7618792440. Every customer is our priority and we will offer a quick resolution to your concern.

Does Dezy offer emergency dental services?

No, Dezy Dental Care does not offer emergency dental services.

What payment options do you accept?

Dezy Dental Care accepts all payment options, including cash, UPI, credit card, and debit card.

Do you offer flexible or EMI payment plans for treatments?

Yes, Dezy Dental Care offers flexible and EMI payment plans for treatments.

How do I cancel or reschedule my appointment?

To cancel or reschedule your appointment, please contact +91 7618792440 for new patients or +91 8047362299 for ongoing patients.

Does Dezy offer dental check-ups and treatments for children?

Yes, Dezy Dental Care offers dental check-ups and treatments for children.

Does Dezy offer pain-free or minimally invasive treatments?

Yes, Dezy Dental Care offers pain-free and minimally invasive treatments.

What are the working hours at Dezy clinics?

Dezy Dental Care clinics are open from 11 AM to 8 PM.

What should I expect during my first visit?

Your first visit at Dezy Dental Care includes a free consultation with the doctor along with a 3D scan.

What should I bring when visiting the clinic for the first time?

You should bring details of any previous medical history when visiting the clinic for the first time.

How often should I get a dental check-up?

It is recommended to get a dental check-up once every 3 months at Dezy Dental Care.

Does your Somajiguda clinic offer emergency dental services?

No, Dezy Dental Somajiguda Clinic does not offer emergency dental services.

What payment options do you accept at the Somajiguda clinic?

Dezy Dental Clinic accepts all payment options, including cash, UPI, credit card, and debit card.

Do you offer flexible or EMI payment plans for treatments?

Yes, Dezy Dental Clinic offers flexible and EMI payment plans for treatments.

How do I cancel or reschedule my appointment?

To cancel or reschedule your appointment at Dezy Dental Clinic, please contact +91 7618792440 for new patients or +91 8047362299 for ongoing patients.

Does Dezy Somajiguda offer dental check-ups and treatments for children?

Yes, Dezy Dental Clinic in Somajiguda offers dental check-ups and treatments for children.

Does Dezy offer pain-free or minimally invasive treatments?

Yes, Dezy Dental Clinic offers pain-free and minimally invasive treatments.

What are the working hours at Dezy Somajiguda clinic?

Dezy Dental Clinic in Somajiguda is open from 11 AM to 8 PM.

What should I expect during my first visit?

At Dezy Dental Clinic, your first visit includes a free consultation with the doctor along with a 3D scan.

What should I bring when visiting the clinic for the first time?

At Dezy Dental Clinic, you should bring details of any previous medical history when visiting the clinic for the first time.

How often should I get a dental check-up?

At Dezy Dental Clinic, it is recommended to get a dental check-up once every 3 months.
